question: Which organization did the humanitarian aid workers killed in the missile strike belong to?
answer: The aid workers belonged to the World Central Kitchen organization.
keypoints: The aid workers killed in the missile strike belonged to the World Central Kitchen organization.

question: Which military force conducted the missile strike on the World Central Kitchen convoy?
answer: The missile strike was conducted by Israeli military aircraft.
keypoints: The missile strike on the World Central Kitchen convoy was conducted by Israeli military aircraft.
